task_description: Implement merge_intervals(intervals): given a list of [start, end] integer intervals (possibly empty, possibly unsorted), return a list of merged non-overlapping intervals sorted by start. Touching intervals (e.g. [1,2] and [2,3]) merge into one. Empty input returns [].

bugs_in_buggy.description: Empty intervals raises IndexError at intervals[0]; spec requires returning [].
bugs_in_buggy.suggested_fix: Add `if not intervals: return []` before accessing intervals[0].

bugs_in_tricky.description: Strict `<` instead of `<=` fails to merge touching intervals like [1,2] and [2,3].
